title: Single user ID every request — 100% cache hit rate hides real DB performance
violated_rule: Test data parameterized — not single-value cache-hit bias
expected_feedback: Standard: same user ID (users/1) every request. Cache hit rate = 100%, so actual DB path is never tested. Production has unique user IDs with 40-60% cache miss rate. Use SharedArray with parameterized data feeds and realistic distribution.
